name: Prince of Wales Hospital
description: Major tertiary teaching hospital providing comprehensive adult medical, surgical, and emergency services for South Eastern Sydney.

name: Sydney Children's Hospital, Randwick
description: Specialist paediatric hospital serving children and young people across NSW, co-located within the Randwick Health Campus.

name: Prince of Wales Private Hospital
description: Private hospital on the Randwick campus offering elective surgery, maternity, and specialist outpatient services.

name: Health Translation Hub
description: State-of-the-art facility connecting research, clinical care, and industry innovation across six dedicated industry floors.
